studyName: A Study of the Genetic Causes of Complex Pediatric Disorders

variables.name: 10th_Perc
variables.description: Indicates whether individual's median LDL value was at the 10th percentile based on "Growth Curves for Cardio-Metabolic Risk Factors in Children and Adolescents" (Cook et al., 2009. PMID: 19732566)

variables.name: 10th_Perc_Thresh
variables.description: Age equivalent LDL threshold for 10th percentile based on "Growth Curves for Cardio-Metabolic Risk Factors in Children and Adolescents" (Cook et al., 2009. PMID: 19732566). Individuals over 18 years of age were aligned with the threshold value for 18-year-olds.

variables.name: 90th_Perc
variables.description: Indicates whether individual's median LDL value was at the 90th percentile based on "Growth Curves for Cardio-Metabolic Risk Factors in Children and Adolescents" (Cook et al., 2009. PMID: 19732566)

variables.name: 90th_Perc_Thresh
variables.description: Age equivalent LDL threshold for 90th percentile based on "Growth Curves for Cardio-Metabolic Risk Factors in Children and Adolescents" (Cook et al., 2009. PMID: 19732566). Individuals over 18 years of age were aligned with the threshold value for 18-year-olds.

variables.name: Affection_Status
variables.description: Indicates whether participant is a case or control

variables.name: Bottom 17%
variables.description: Indicates whether individual's median LDL value was in the bottom 17% of all patients in CHOP database

variables.name: Chip_Type
variables.description: Array on which participants were genotyped

variables.name: HDL_values
variables.description: Human low-density lipoprotein (HLDL) values for all procedures/tests performed

variables.name: LDL_MAX
variables.description: Maximum LDL values based on all visits

variables.name: LDL_Mean
variables.description: Mean LDL values based on all visits

variables.name: LDL_Median
variables.description: Median LDL values based on all visits

variables.name: LDL_Min
variables.description: Minimum LDL values based on all visits

variables.name: LDL_Values
variables.description: Low-density lipoprotein (LDL) values for all procedures/tests.

variables.name: Lipid_procedure_codes
variables.description: Codes for procedures/tests performed

variables.name: ORIGIN_ID
variables.description: ID of eMERGE Consortium Site

variables.name: Percentile
variables.description: LDL percentile score

variables.name: Primary_Diagnoses
variables.description: Primary diagnosis as defined by ICD9 code(s)

variables.name: Race_Med
variables.description: Ethnicity of participant as identified by medical records

variables.name: Race_Survey
variables.description: Ethnicity of participant as identified by patient/patient's parent

variables.name: Recent_LDL
variables.description: Most recent LDL visit.

variables.name: Recent_LDL_age_days
variables.description: Most recent low-density lipoprotein (LDL) value.

variables.name: Recent_LDL_value
variables.description: Most recent low-density lipoprotein (LDL) value

variables.name: Recent_Time_of_Day
variables.description: Time of day of most recent visit in which LDL was recorded

variables.name: SUBJID
variables.description: Randomly-generated 6-digit ID code preceded by CHOP ID code (95)

variables.name: Secondary_Diagnoses
variables.description: Secondary diagnoses as defined by ICD9 code(s)

variables.name: Sex_Med
variables.description: Gender of participant as identified by medical records

variables.name: Sex_Survey
variables.description: Gender of participant as identified by survey of patient/patient's parent

variables.name: Top 17%
variables.description: Indicates whether individual's median LDL value was in the top 17% of all patients in CHOP database

variables.name: Trig_Values
variables.description: Triglycerides values for all procedures/tests performed

variables.name: VLDL_Values
variables.description: Very low-density lipoprotein (VLDL) values for all procedures/tests performed

variables.name: Visit_Count
variables.description: Number of visits in which LDL was recorded
